message:
fix: close 5 unbounded memory violations in operator pipeline

- AggregateOperator: incrementally merge partials instead of accumulating
  all in an array — O(groups) memory instead of O(batches × groups)
- mergeQueryResults: use k-way merge for sorted results without limit,
  limit-aware concat with early termination for bounded results
- LocalExecutor: always pass FsSpillBackend + memory budget to pipeline
  options and HashJoinOperator so spill is available for joins
- ProjectOperator: create new projected row objects instead of deleting
  keys (avoids V8 hidden class deoptimization)
- HashJoinOperator: sample first batch to estimate row size and go
  straight to partitioned spill if right side likely exceeds budget
